11.response: {"Q0":"Concentration levels and a level of multi-tasking"}

13.response: {"Q0":"Fantastic game! Hope I'm able to do it again sometime soon, really enjoyed it.  It's a very relaxing game and allows you to take your mind off stress."}

0.response: {"Q0":"Just tried to focus on the level of probability on higher numbers on occassion, when my eyes dont go fuzzy.  But in all the game was really great!"}

1.response: {"Q0":"Just when my eyes went fuzzy, and I couldnt see the number but only the yellow bar, i then selected the one with the higer level of yellow, hope that makes sence."}

2.response: {"Q0":"To be entirely honest - I cant recall how frequent, i mainly concentrated on not getting the JKL keys confused when having to dig"}

3.response: {"Q0":"Yes i make a mental note when the red astronaut left to NOT do any digging on that planet and also NOT to select the red gem with the meteor shower"}
